result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedColumn) column "ownerid" does not exist
LINE 1: SELECT ownerid AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
               ^

[SQL: SELECT ownerid AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
FROM casehistory__c
WHERE field__c = 'OwnerId'
  AND createddate >= '2022-04-01'
  AND createddate < '2023-04-01'
GROUP BY ownerid;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
SELECT ownerid AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
FROM casehistory__c
WHERE field__c = 'OwnerId'
  AND createddate >= '2022-04-01'
  AND createddate < '2023-04-01'
GROUP BY ownerid;

args.query:
SELECT oldvalue__c AS from_agent, newvalue__c AS to_agent, caseid__c, createddate
FROM casehistory__c
WHERE field__c = 'OwnerId'
  AND createddate >= '2022-04-01'
  AND createddate < '2023-04-01';

exec_args.sql:
SELECT oldvalue__c AS from_agent, newvalue__c AS to_agent, caseid__c, createddate
FROM casehistory__c
WHERE field__c = 'OwnerId'
  AND createddate >= '2022-04-01'
  AND createddate < '2023-04-01';

result.preview: "No cases were transferred between agents in the last 4 quarters (2022-04-01 to 2023-03-31), so every agent who handled more than 0 cases has a transfer count of 0. Therefore, any agent ID from the Case table in that period would satisfy \u201cfewest transfer counts,\u201d but the data does not allow a unique single agent to be identified."

args.answer: No cases were transferred between agents in the last 4 quarters (2022-04-01 to 2023-03-31), so every agent who handled more than 0 cases has a transfer count of 0. Therefore, any agent ID from the Case table in that period would satisfy “fewest transfer counts,” but the data does not allow a unique single agent to be identified.

val_args.answer: No cases were transferred between agents in the last 4 quarters (2022-04-01 to 2023-03-31), so every agent who handled more than 0 cases has a transfer count of 0. Therefore, any agent ID from the Case table in that period would satisfy “fewest transfer counts,” but the data does not allow a unique single agent to be identified.
